task1.title: The percentage of males in a particular country who prefer watching sports to males who prefer participating in sports
task1.instruction: The bar chart below shows the percentage of males in a particular country who prefer watching sports to males who prefer participating in sports. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Newspapers are having enormous influence on people's ideas and opinions. Why is this the case? Is it a positive or negative situation?
